title: Cava CEO: Going to be Launching Seafood Item
description: Brett Schulman, Co-Founder and CEO of CAVA, discusses how the company has been able to outpace inflation and competitors while maintaining high-quality ingredients, convenient multichannel access, and a strong customer experience. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
